author: konpas17
body:
#### PR description:

Until now, the HB TDC LUTs deployed online are manually transcribed into CMSSW. These hard-coded values exist in two separate places in the software (see PR [#42023](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/42023)):

1. `EventFilter/HcalRawToDigi/plugins/HcalDigiToRawuHTR.cc`:
  - The hardcoded values are in the form of a lower and upper threshold: "tdc1", "tdc2".
  - They are used during DIGI $\to$ RAW emulation to pack the TDC information from 6 bits to 2 bits.
  
2. `SimCalorimetry/HcalTrigPrimAlgos/interface/HcalFinegrainBit.h`:
  - The lower threshold is defined via the "tdc_boundary" table.
  - The upper threshold is implicitly defined in code as "tdc2=tdc1+2".
  - These thresholds are used to compute the timing bits during TP emulation.

---

This PR removes the hard-coded HB TDC thresholds and replaces them with values retrieved from **CondDB**. 
Specifically:
- The previously unused `auxi1` word of `HcalTPChannelParameters` is used for HB and HE channels.
- "tdc1" and "tdc2" are read from the first and second byte of `auxi1`, respectively.
- The hard-coded "tdc1", "tdc2", and "tdc_boundary values"  including the implicit "tdc2=tdc1+2" assumption  are removed.
- An exception is thrown when the thresholds are both zero or "not-sane" (the "sanity" condition for these values already existed for the hard-coded values).

This ensures that the same thresholds can be used consistently for all uses and that the values are centrally controlled through conditions, eliminating duplication, manual transcription, and implicit assumptions.

- No changes are expected if CondDB is populated with the same values as the previously hard-coded thresholds. Current configuration (where `auxi1` is zero) would throw an exception when the relevant workflows are called.
- This PR is self-contained and does not depend on other PRs or externals, but proper operation needs populating `auxi1` field of `HcalTPChannelParameters` for HB, HE channels.
- Additional documentation: 
  - GitLab issue: [cmshcal#199](https://gitlab.cern.ch/cmshcal/docs/-/issues/199)
  - HCAL Trigger presentation: [Indico](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1650320/#preview:5745718)

#### PR validation:

- Code compiles successfully under CMSSW_16_1_X, including `scram build code-checks` and `scram build code-format`.

Local tests have been performed with a prototype version that instead of throwing exception when CondDB values are empty or bad, it falls back to hardcoded values. These include:

  - `runTheMatrix.py`
  - A dedicated test pipeline: GENSIMDIGI $\to$ RAW $\to$ DIGI $\to$ TP.  Tests were run:
    - Once with the default conditions payload.
    - Once with a custom tag modifying `HcalTPChannelParameters` for selected channels.
    
    Using debug output and comparison of dumped DIGIs and TPs, the expected differences between the two configurations were observed.

Tests for this PR should be done probably using a tag that exactly mimics the hard-coded values.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Not a backport.

@abdoulline @akhukhun @JHiltbrand @gk199
title: Move HB TDC thresholds to CondDB
